codeReview.summary: The fix fully addresses the earlier blocking prep-to-studio gap: ready items now navigate from the preparation page into a real item-scoped studio route, non-ready items remain blocked by the API, and the destination renders a valid minimal studio shell instead of dead-ending.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, prior failed review, and related code for `repair-preparation-ready-item-studio-entry`. The previous blocking issue from `preparation-lifecycle-and-retry` is resolved by replacing the dead-end button with working navigation, adding ready-only item loading, and providing a real minimal studio destination; no new code issues found within this feature scope.
